error_signature: submit button does not trigger workflow due to hidden required fields
title: Submit button fails due to hidden required fields
symptom: The submit button on the form container does not trigger the workflow when clicked, and no error message is displayed to the user.
not_this_if: All required fields are visible and filled
root_cause: When required fields are hidden in the form, the browser cannot validate them, leading to the submit action being ignored without any feedback to the user. This prevents the workflow from being triggered.
fix_steps: Make sure all required fields are visible to the user
Alternatively, remove the 'required' attribute from hidden fields if they are not necessary
agent_instruction: Ensure that all required fields in the form are visible or adjust their required status.
